author: davion-knight
title: Budget-aware batched breadth miner
notes: Self-contained stdlib agent. Ranks Solidity/Vyper sources by risk, then audits them in up to 3 batched inference calls (respecting the 3-call/24k-token per-problem budget) to cover more contracts per problem. Emits matcher-shaped high/critical findings; degrades gracefully on 429/errors.
